wins: Closed highest TCV quarter ever at $2.8 billion
Generated highest ever reported adjusted operating margin of 51%
risks: Revenue from strategic commercial contracts is expected to be less than half of 1% of full year revenue
Anticipated fourth quarter 2025 revenue from these contracts to be between $2 million to $4 million
Net dollar retention does not yet fully capture the acceleration in U.S. business over the past year
RPO is primarily comprised of commercial business and does not include government contracts with short terms
Stock-based compensation expense and equity-related employer payroll tax expense are significant
